datasheet.text: In your Command phase , select one of the following to apply to this model’s unit until the end of the turn: This model’s unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced . This model’s unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in it which it Advanced. This model’s unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back .
datasheet.name: Master of Rites

datasheet.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill characteristics and/or all modifiers to the Hit roll .
datasheet.name: Unrelenting and Uncompromising

This model’s unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in it which it Advanced.
This model’s unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back .

unit_composition.text: heavy bolt pistol; relic thunder hammer.
